labs.name: Cash Bonus
labs.unlock: Unlocked with [[Lab Upgrades|Labs]] in [[Milestones]] on tier 1 wave 30. Has 99 levels. Each level increase the increments of each workshop upgrade and raises the maximum workshop value.
